transcript.text:
(Hangang ramyun that I enjoyed in the city) Take all these to there
(I want that machine...) That's really fascinating
It's quite fun to cook it this way
(So I bought it) So I brought it home!
(I can enjoy Hangang ramyun at home now)
(I'll call it heaven...!)
(I couldn't eat endlessly at Hangang)
(It became her favorite machine) I think this is the best purchase I've ever made this year!
It's so pretty
Hello, everyone!
Today!
(Wait, why is it there...?!) Ta-da! Actually, I went to a
unmanned ramyun place a few days ago
(The ramyun machine was so convenient) and I really wanted the machine
(It's a must-have item for a ramyun lover!) Since I eat at least two packs of ramyun every day,
I thought it'd be very convenient so I bought it!

So I'm going to do a Hangang ramyun mukbang at home today
I've seen this in some offices,
but I've never seen someone who has it at home
(So much ramyun) I prepared various kinds of ramyun today
(The proof of 2 packs a day...) These are always there
(Let's do this) I'll start cooking now then
(Various toppings just like the shop) I also prepared toppings as well
(Starting with Shin Ramyun..!) Should I start with Shin Ramyun? The basic one first!
(Shake it)
Should I add
one egg in this?
(Different buttons) There are #1, #2, #3, #4 buttons
(for different kinds of ramyun) based on the types of ramyun
(#1 for the basic) #1
(It's cooking now!) I'm so excited
(Topping) I'll simply add an egg for Shin Ramyun

(Tzuyang's pouring time)
(3 minutes feel like 3 hours...)
(Adding the egg!)
(Done cooking) It's done!
(Finished) Ta-da!
(Yum) It looks so delicious
Bon appétit
I prepared a ladle
for this...
(Ramyun ladle) This is my ladle for eating ramyun
(Wow)
Wow, it's so good..!
(Hangang ramyun is still better) It's not as good as Hangang
(but very similar) but it's close enough!
Shin Ramyun is perfect with an egg!
(Noisy) I'll turn it off for now since it's loud

(Quiet)
(Kimchi is a must) Kimchi
(Empty) I already finished it
I finish it too fast when I make one at a time
Next one right away
Chapagetti!
You don't need to drain the water for Chapagetti
You just boil it down
(Plop)
The number...
What?
(#3 for ramyun without soup)
(Clean)
(Gotta stir it for it to be good)
(Adding cheese as well...!)
(It's finished) It's ready

(Ah... Is this heaven?) Ta-da, it looks amazing, right?
Get the cheesy part...
(Oh well) I'll just mix it
This is
cooked perfectly, nice and thick!
(Look at how thick and glossy it looks...)
It definitely tastes better when cooked with this...!
I should get another one for the office
(Boss, can we get one as well?)
Oh, I totally forgot about this
(Forgot the most important thing...) I always forget about this one..
I'm so stupid
(Olive oil) I added it when it's only a bite left
It tastes completely different after I added olive oil
The next one is Ojingeo Jjamppong
(Drop)

I prepared a seafood mix
for Ojingeo Jjamppong
(Ta-da!)
(Adding as much seafood I want!)
(Like this) I added seafood like this
(#1 for ramyun with soup!) #1
Clear!
(It'll be more tasty because of all the toppings, right?)
(Done cooking)
(Finished) Next up is Ojingeo Jjamppong
This is really Ojingeo Jjamppong
There's
(This is real Ojingeo Jjamppong) real squid here
Wow, this is real jjamppong
It's so delicious
Put the mussel on top

Oh, it's good
I used to like Ojingeo Jjamppong a lot
I crushed
(Ramyun porridge where you crushed the noodles) the noodles into small pieces like rice
and cooked it and ate with a spoon
It was so good when I made it with beef bone broth
It's delicious
Next, next, next
Since I ate a soup ramyun...
Oh, this is all...
Ahem, no soup
(Kicking one out) I should change one to a soup ramyun
(Whew.. I made it) Toowoomba Ramyun
(Shockingly delicious) When I first ate it, I thought, 'Wow, it's really good'
(Toowoomba Ramyun for the first time) so I bought a couple packs
You add the powdered soup

and the extra at the end
(Ramyun without soup is #3!) #3
(Can't leave the soup behind...!)
I'll add more time
(Add the soup packet)
(Stir well...!)
(Done cooking) Done! Was it always white?
(Smells good) Mm, it smells good
(The color is definitely Toowoomba...)
Oh, it's kinda orange now
It's a bit
more orange than on screen
It's very savory!
It'll be so good with cheese
(Immediate execution) I'll put it in right away
I can taste cheddar cheese

and it also has a strong milk cream flavor
so it's like pasta
If you put cheddar cheese from the start
and mix it, it's really delicious
Do they still sell this...?
(Gotta find out right away...)
(It says they still sell it... Yes... Haha)
I should've prepared other ramyun while eating
(Buldak OUT...) I ate too much Buldak
(Udon IN) Ta-da
(The best beef bone broth noodles) I enjoy eating this among all the beef bone broth noodles
It feels like I'm eating those thin noodles in beef bone soup
so I like it
#1
It's 1:30AM right now
(Isn't this too much for a late night snack?) How many packs of ramyun am I eating at 1:30AM?

(Done cooking) Oh? It's already done
I think...
Among the white broth,
beef bone broth noodles,
I like this one the best
among the beef bone noodles
This
might not show up on screen
but the soup is very...
Ah! The seasoning packet! Again..!
(Oh dear)
(Forgot the green onion flakes) This is just green onion flakes
There's green onion flakes over there too!
(Prepared it well but they're decoration now...) I prepared it all but didn't eat it
(Kimchi is perfect with beef bone broth noodles!) I'm finally eating kimchi
These noodles

are very thin
like those thin noodles
But they're still delicious
I don't really like noodles that are too thin
Beef bone broth noodles are the best with kimchi
Actually,
since this is a hangang ramyun mukbang,
I prepared a lot of foil bowls
(You can use) but you can just get an induction pot
(induction pots too) It's easy to use with this
Gan Jjamppong? Ah.. I'm not craving it...
What I'm craving right now is
Cold Bean Ramyun..?
When did I buy this?
(It's not the hangang vibe but I'm curious) It doesn't fit with hangang ramyun but I'm curious
so I'll try it

(Powdered bean soup) I think this is for the bean soup
(#2)
(Drained the water)
This is the bean soup
(Pour)
The consistency is completely just cold bean noodles!
Do you want to see it?
(It doesn't look like instant ramyun) It looks like real cold bean noodles, can you see it?
I'll try the soup first!
(Cold bean noodles... It works?) Amazing! They made it so well
It think it'll be good to eat
whenever you crave cold bean noodles
(Never-ending slurping)
Ah, it'd be better with a bit of salt
(Too late) But I'm almost done
It's similar to the ones in restaurants

I don't know
if it's because I haven't tried a lot of cold bean noodles
(Unexpectedly ate so well...) Wow, that was so unexpected
Should I eat tteok tuna ramyun?
(Samyang Ramen Gold that I enjoyed) I ate it at the ramyun place and it was so good
(Tend to stock up if it's good..) I already ate 2-3 big packs of it
(Yum)
I'll put a lot of tuna on top
(#1)
(Kimchi as well..!) Tuna kimchi ramyun
(Complete!) It's done!
It's very similar!
Is it not?
Adding kimchi and tuna
makes it taste like tuna kimchi-jjigae
Is it obvious?

(Yes...)
(But where did the tteok go..?) Shall I try tteok tuna ramyun?
(Shush...)
Oh, it tastes just like tuna kimchi-jjigae
(Hot)
It's too hot
(It's a bit late but...) It's dried green onions
(Adding)
It looks just like the normal green onions...!
(Of course...) Wait, they look the same!
But the dried green onions are more sweet and delicious!
It's more tasty!
Wow, I need to mix this with rice
(But since it's 2AM, let's not do that...) But I won't do it, it's 2AM
(Is it okay eating ramyun before a photoshoot?) I have a photoshoot tomorrow, what if my face gets so puffy?
Should I stop now?

(The last one...) I'll stop after this one!
(Gotta eat even if my face get puffy) I wanted to eat this
(Different version of Saeng Saeng Udon) I really like Saeng Saeng Udon but I haven't tried Saeng Saeng Yaki Udon
(Ta-da!)
After removing the water
(Ta-da!)
Teriyaki udon!
(Mixing it thoroughly)
(Complete) It has a very interesting look
Let me try it!
Oh, it's hot!
It's better than I thought!
It tastes just like
chewy udon mixed with
teriyaki sauce
They go very well

(8 packs of ramyun for a late night snack...) I enjoyed them all
Since it's already 2AM, I'll stop here
I think this is the best purchase I made this year!
It's so pretty
I enjoyed eating today! Bye!
